nasb.text: Even Lebanon is not enough to burn, Nor its beasts enough for a burnt offering.

esv.text: Lebanon would not suffice for fuel, nor are its beasts enough for a burnt offering.

cnv.text: 黎巴嫩的樹林不夠當柴燒， 其中的走獸也不夠作燔祭。

ccb.text: 黎巴嫩的树木不够作献祭的燃料， 林中的走兽也不够作燔祭。

csbs.text: 黎巴嫩的树林不够当柴烧， 其中的野兽也不够作燔祭。
